title: Cyclodium guianense
taxonomy: Cyclodium guianense is classified within the family Polypodiaceae. This family is a part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. Within the family Polypodiaceae, Cyclodium guianense is a member of the genus Cyclodium. The genus Cyclodium is further divided into several species, and Cyclodium guianense is one of them. This classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the fern group.
uses: Cyclodium guianense is known to have various medicinal properties, with uses ranging from treating digestive issues to reducing fever and inflammation. Traditionally, Cyclodium guianense has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, fever, and inflammation, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
